full_text:
Feng Shi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Shi. Masters of Writing, executed by Cao Cao for unspecified wrongdoing. Feng Shi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Feng Shi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
